correction: SUPERSEDED — Dialogue MUST be embedded in Sora prompt so the person actually speaks the words. But NO timestamps in prompt. Write dialogue as natural speech within the continuous action description
Language must be natural Malaysian English — NOT heavy Manglish. No overuse of la, lah, gila, sedap. Light particles (one per script max) are fine
Scripts need review-style dialogue: discovery, reaction, honest verdict — not just hook then eat then CTA
applied_to: Beat structure expanded from 3 to 5 (hook, discover, taste, verdict, CTA)

correction: Each variant must use a different ad framework (PAS, SLAP, UGC Testimonial) for variety — not all the same structure
applied_to: assign_frameworks() routes different frameworks per variant

correction: Sora prompts need iPhone selfie feel: slight shake, autofocus micro-pulses, no stabilization, natural edge distortion, slight overexposure
Include authenticity signals: hesitation before trying, specific sensory details, honest admissions, natural pauses
STRICT word limits per beat — LLM will exceed soft limits. Use hard caps: Beat 1=8 words, Beat 2-3=12 words, Beat 4-5=8 words. Auto-trim any excess
Combinatorial mode needs 4+ bodies for 10 variants to avoid repetitive beats 2-5. Scale: ceil(num_variants/3) bodies

ONE continuous shot for 12s video — NO scene changes, NO timestamped beats, NO zoom. Real UGC creators hold one selfie angle the entire time. Multiple scenes = food looks inconsistent + more AI artifacts
applied_to: build_sora_prompt_from_parts rewritten to single continuous shot

correction: SPOON for rice bowls, NOT chopsticks. Chopsticks are only for noodle dishes. Malaysian/SEA standard: spoon (primary) + fork. Chopsticks for rice instantly signals inauthenticity
Drop specific ethnicities (Malay, Chinese, Indian) from Sora prompts — Sora cannot reliably distinguish SEA ethnicities. Use 'Southeast Asian woman' instead
Camera must stay at consistent arm-length selfie distance. NEVER zoom in closer. The progressive zoom-in to extreme face close-up is the #1 AI tell
SUPERSEDED — 5-beat structure (hook/discover/taste/verdict/CTA) was too many beats. Reduced to 3 beats: hook (0-4s), discover+taste (4-8s), verdict+CTA (8-12s). Simpler = more believable
Need at least 1 food close-up scene. Pure single-shot misses food showcase. Support 3 cut types: single_shot (0 cuts), one_cut (face→food), two_cut (face→food→face). Mix for variety

Dialogue MUST be IN the Sora prompt — the person speaks the lines in the video. No separate TTS. Sora generates the talking. Specify accent in prompt: 'says in Malaysian English' or 'says in Malaysian Mandarin Chinese'

Language follows the brief — if brief is in Chinese or mentions Chinese audience, scripts and Sora voice are in Malaysian Chinese (Mandarin). Otherwise Malaysian English. detect_language() auto-detects

Dialogue sounded too westernized/American. Must sound like real Malaysian woman talking to friend. Malaysian English has syllable-timed rhythm, flat intonation, code-switching. NOT American influencer style

Frame extraction (imageio+PIL) is wrong way to review videos — misses motion, lip sync, temporal artifacts. Use instead: (1) open video.mp4 to watch, (2) ffmpeg contact sheet, (3) motion diff sheet (tblend), (4) preview GIF

SUPERSEDED — 'discover+taste+verdict' beat structure was WRONG for testimonial UGC. Real Malaysian UGC testimonials follow BEFORE→ACTION→RESULT: (1) Her specific before-state/situation, (2) What she did about it + shows product naturally, (3) Specific result with timeframe + personal commitment. She is NOT trying food for the first time — she ALREADY uses it and is sharing her ongoing experience. No first-bite reactions, no food reveals. Product is a prop in her story, not the star.

Dialogue must have SPECIFIC details from the brief — not vague praise. Must mention: timeframes (5 days, one week), body changes (bloating gone, pants fit, no 3pm crash), real numbers (400 cal, 50+ menu). Generic lines like 'wow so good' or 'so light so filling' are useless

Single mode: ALWAYS 1 Sora generation per variant (12s). No splitting into multiple clips and stitching. For one_cut/two_cut, the camera movement (tilt to food, cut to food) happens WITHIN the single 12s generation. The Sora prompt describes the full flow. Splitting wastes credits and produces inconsistent results.
applied_to: run_single_shot_mode — 1 job per variant, no stitch_clips

correction: NEVER describe food appearance, container shape, colour, texture, or ingredients in Sora prompts. The input_reference image carries the full food visual. Prompt should only say 'the meal' or 'the food'. Text descriptions conflict with and override the reference image, producing food that doesn't match.
applied_to: Sora prompt templates (single_shot, one_cut, two_cut) + Sora Prompt Rules #7-#8

correction: When brief specifies ethnicity (e.g. 'malaysian chinese'), use that in persona description — Sora CAN distinguish Chinese/Malay/Indian features. 'Southeast Asian woman' is only the default fallback when no ethnicity is specified. detect_ethnicity() parses the brief.

Clothing palette in brand config is a REFERENCE for brand tone, not a fixed wardrobe. Vary outfit colours and styles across variants — never repeat the same colour. Go beyond cream/sage/beige/dusty rose: include white, oatmeal, lavender, soft grey, terracotta, chambray, khaki, sand, mocha.
applied_to: SINGLE_SHOT_PROMPT Persona & Visual Rules + PERSONA_POOL expanded wardrobe

correction: NEVER use 'Cut to' or 'Cut back to' in Sora prompts — hard scene cuts break Sora's joint audio-video pipeline and produce silent videos. Use continuous camera movements instead: 'tilts phone down to show food... tilts back up to face'. Also ALWAYS end every sora_prompt with explicit audio instruction: 'Audio: her voice is clear and close-mic, natural room ambience in background.'
applied_to: two_cut template rewritten to continuous camera tilt + audio footer added to all 3 templates

correction: SUPERSEDED — Camera tilts/pans to food don't work because input_reference only anchors frame 1. When camera moves away, Sora invents new food visuals that don't match. Instead use FRAMING PROGRESSION with timestamps: 0-3s selfie mid-shot → 3-8s tight macro close-up on meal → 8-12s medium close-up on face. This is a zoom/framing change, NOT a camera movement. Sora prompt must follow structured format: Format → Framing & Progression → Lighting → Subject & Action Beats → Dialogue (separate section) → Audio. Dialogue MUST be in a separate labeled block, not inline with actions.
applied_to: All Sora prompt templates rewritten to structured framing progression format

correction: Silent audio fix: (1) Start EVERY Sora prompt with 'With audio.' (2) End with 'Audio priority: 1st her dialogue (close, clear, front-mic), 2nd gentle room ambience (distant, 30% volume).' (3) Use 'speaks clearly' not 'says'. These 3 fixes together reduced silent video rate from ~42% to 0% in testing.
applied_to: All Sora prompt templates — prefix + audio priority footer + speaks clearly verb

correction: Sora prompts must have MINIMAL physical actions. Only: looks at camera, picks up spoon, takes a bite, nods. Do NOT include gesturing at screen, pointing at food, gesturing towards meal, waving, or any complex hand movements. Too many described actions degrade video quality significantly.
applied_to: All 3 Sora prompt templates — removed [Specific gesture] and [CTA gesture] placeholders, removed 'gestures at food'

correction: When brief language is Chinese/华语, dialogue rules must switch entirely to Malaysian 华语 style — NOT just translate English Manglish rules. Malaysian 华语 has: (1) code-switching with English/Malay (hallmark feature), (2) Chinese particles 啦/咯/哦/嘛/咩/嗬, (3) short staccato clauses not flowing sentences, (4) fillers like 就是/然后hor/okay就是说, (5) NEVER formal written Chinese or mainland internet slang. Beat examples, word limits, and DOs/DON'Ts all need Chinese-specific versions.
applied_to: SINGLE_SHOT_PROMPT — speech_style_guide, dialogue_dos_and_limits, beat_structure_and_examples, dialogue_budget all now language-conditional
